description: Style NoteA modern feminist take on the classic wingtip brogue shoe for men, this pair boasts wintip styling on the ever-so-classic ballet style shoe. A versatile shoe you will not regret buying, style this with off-duty and formal ensembles.Product DetailsBlunt toed shoe with slip-on styling and brogue detailsShort kitten heelTPR outsole with horizontal grooves all overMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
